audit_methods: manual review of CDE→SEL enforcement path
review of enforcement_action_record usage across codebase

findings.description: No structural enforcement gate existed between CDE decisions and SEL execution. CDE decisions (evaluation_control_decision, continuation_decision_record) could route to SEL without any mandatory enforcement_action_record requirement being checked at the gate.
findings.evidence: grep for enforcement_action_record found only judgment_enforcement.py (limited scope) and the new enforcement_gate.py
findings.resolution: Fixed in Step 5 (PR #1176): spectrum_systems/modules/runtime/enforcement_gate.py created. apply_enforcement_gate() marks all non-allow decisions with enforcement_required=True and enforcement_action_record_required_before_execution=True. verify_enforcement_recorded() raises RuntimeError on bypass attempt.

findings.description: No bypass patterns found in enforcement execution path. No early-return on 'allow', no optional enforcement flags, no TODO-deferred enforcement in runtime or governance modules.
findings.evidence: grep audit: zero matches for 'if.*action.*allow.*return', 'enforce.*optional', 'bypass.*enforce' patterns in spectrum_systems/

findings.description: judgment_enforcement.py already records judgment_enforcement_action_record before executing judgment enforcement actions. The record is built and validated via validate_artifact() before the action proceeds.
findings.resolution: No fix required. Pattern is correct; judgment path is already compliant.

findings.description: The new enforcement_gate.py is not yet wired into the existing control_loop.run_control_loop() or sel_orchestration_runner execution paths. These paths do not yet route through the gate.
findings.resolution: Scheduled for CTRL-LOOP closure (Steps 8-11). The gate module is available and tested. Integration into orchestration paths is PR #1178 scope.

summary.notes: No enforcement bypasses found in active execution paths. The structural gap (no enforcement gate) was addressed in Step 5. RT2-004 integration is tracked for PR #1178.

contract_boundary_audit.coverage: judgment path already covered; evaluation_control path now gated via enforcement_gate.py
